Try SPACE or LEFT.

end of world model.

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Player position: {blue_player[0]['boundary']}")

# Check red path
red_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'R']
print(f"Red path: {len(red_nodes)} nodes, total pixels: {sum(n['pixels'] for n in red_nodes)}")
for n in red_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")

# Check the top-left corner - did the player reset?
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nTop-left (rows 7-14, cols 12-22):")
for i in range(7, 15):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][12:22]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
